design_philosophy.rationale: For an academic data structures project, the design must exude authority, clarity, and precision. We use a modular Swiss grid, rigid typography, and stark contrast to make the Max-Heap algorithm visualization feel objective and trustworthy.
key_principles: Expose the grid skeleton (1px borders everywhere).
Typography drives the hierarchy (oversized titles, compact technical metadata).
Color is functional: Monochrome structure with Signal Red reserved strictly for the highest priority/critical state.

spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Grid Borders: Elements are divided by solid 1px borders (border-border). Zero border-radius (rounded-none) for a brutalist, academic feel. No soft shadows, only hard lines.

buttons.primary: rounded-none bg-accent text-inverse hover:bg-black/80 px-8 py-6 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-colors
buttons.destructive: rounded-none bg-primary text-inverse hover:bg-primary_hover px-8 py-6 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-colors
buttons.outline: rounded-none border-2 border-accent bg-transparent text-primary hover:bg-accent hover:text-inverse px-8 py-6 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-all

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-none p-8 md:p-12

inputs.default: rounded-none border-border bg-transparent focus:border-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent transition-all text-base px-4 py-6

tables.style: Widespread use of 1px borders. Header row uppercase, monospaced. Data cells use generous padding (py-6).

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Left column: Project Title ('Projek Struktur Data - Kelompok 10'), oversized H1. Short description of Max-Heap algorithm addressing resource allocation. Right column: The abstract geometric 3D visualization image.
sections.interaction: Fade-in entrance animation for text, slight parallax on image.

sections.name: Team Roster
sections.description: A modular grid (3 columns) displaying the team members (Gustavolta Khizqi Ismail, M. Fajar Novyanto, Angga Farel Kusuma) with their IDs. Styled like an editorial masthead.
sections.styling: Top border on the section. Each name paired with a monospaced ID.

sections.name: CTA
sections.description: Massive full-width section with a solid black button: 'INPUT DATA SEKOLAH'.

sections.name: Form Container
sections.description: A structured, ticket-like form. Fields: Nama Sekolah, Alamat, Jumlah Siswa, Kondisi Fasilitas (Select: Rusak Berat, Sedang, Ringan), Jumlah Ruang Kelas Rusak, Jarak ke Kota (km).
sections.styling: Inputs stretch full width. Select dropdowns use strict square corners. Submit button spans full width, bold accent color.

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Title: 'Prioritas Alokasi Bantuan'. Subtitle: 'Berdasarkan Perhitungan Skor Urgensi (Max-Heap)'. CTA to 'Input Data Baru'.

sections.name: Ranking Table
sections.description: List of schools ranked by urgency. The top row (Rank 1, Root of Max-Heap) MUST be highlighted with a vivid background (e.g., bg-primary/10) and red text to denote critical priority. Includes a visual 'Urgency Score' badge.
sections.styling: Table cells divided by hard 1px borders. Monospace fonts for numbers and scores.

hero_image.description: Abstract geometric 3D visualization of a Max-Heap data structure with a glowing red root node. Place this on the right side of the Welcome Page hero section.

icons.usage: Use strictly for functional UI (arrows, close buttons, chevron in selects). Do not use decorative icons. Minimalist and sharp.

motion.global: Subtle, fast, functional. No bouncy physics.
motion.page_load: Framer motion stagger-children for the team list and results table rows.

accessibility.contrast: All text must exceed 4.5:1 ratio against background. Pure black on off-white ensures maximum legibility.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='input-sekolah-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'rounded-none' rule for all elements (buttons, inputs, cards) to maintain the Swiss/Brutalist aesthetic.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all major headings. Ensure it is imported via Google Fonts or standard CDN if not local.
Use 1px borders extensively to create structure, removing the need for drop shadows.
In the Results table, mathematically map a fake 'Urgency Score' using the form inputs to demonstrate the Max-Heap concept, placing the highest score at the top.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as requested.
